steps.title: Simplify the inequality
steps.content:
Starting with $ax - 18 \le 14$, add 18 to both sides:
$$ax \le 32$$

steps.title: Recognize why a must be negative
steps.content: The solution $x \ge -8$ is a lower bound. When dividing an inequality by a value, the direction reverses only if that value is negative. Since $ax \le 32$ yields $x \ge -8$ (a reversal), we must have $a \lt 0$.

steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content:
Divide both sides of $ax \le 32$ by the negative value $a$:
$$x \ge \frac{32}{a}$$
Matching this to the solution $x \ge -8$:
$$\frac{32}{a} = -8$$
Solving: $32 = -8a$, which gives $a = -4$. The greatest possible value of $a$ is -4.
